title: crotalaria suffruticosa
intro: Crotalaria suffruticosa, also known as the small shrub crotalaria or small bush rattle pod, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crotalaria suffruticosa include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are typically made from the leaves and roots of the plant.
